ballpark_pal.description: A slightly asymmetric outfield with a deeper-than-average left side . The more shallow right side is guarded by a 23-foot-tall fence with a unique balcony overhanging the field.

weather.description: A slightly asymmetric outfield with a deeper-than-average left side . The more shallow right side is guarded by a 23-foot-tall fence with a unique balcony overhanging the field.

ballpark_pal.description: A neutral-sized retractable roof venue where every opportunity is taken to play outdoors. A closed roof is well-received by hitters on cold Toronto days but can favor pitchers when its hot out .

weather.description: A neutral-sized retractable roof venue where every opportunity is taken to play outdoors. A closed roof is well-received by hitters on cold Toronto days but can favor pitchers when its hot out .

ballpark_pal.description: A uniquely-shaped field with a home-run-friendly right side . The left-field corner is particularly deep while most of the outfield perimeter is closer than average . A 21-foot-tall fence compensates for the short distance down the right field line.

weather.description: A uniquely-shaped field with a home-run-friendly right side . The left-field corner is particularly deep while most of the outfield perimeter is closer than average . A 21-foot-tall fence compensates for the short distance down the right field line.

ballpark_pal.description: A horizontal-shaped outfield with taller-than-average fences. Shallow to center field and deep to the corners . A 16-foot wall covers most of the right-field gap, compensating for how close it is at parts.

weather.description: A horizontal-shaped outfield with taller-than-average fences. Shallow to center field and deep to the corners . A 16-foot wall covers most of the right-field gap, compensating for how close it is at parts.

ballpark_pal.description: An asymmetrical venue with an extremely deep left field fence. Tall fences guard against an otherwise shallow outfield . The 21-foot-tall fence down the right field line makes a good target for extra base hits in the yard .

weather.description: An asymmetrical venue with an extremely deep left field fence. Tall fences guard against an otherwise shallow outfield . The 21-foot-tall fence down the right field line makes a good target for extra base hits in the yard .

ballpark_pal.description: The smallest outfield in MLB, offset partially by a taller left-field wall . Stadium architecture dampens the effect from wind but hot days can turn GABP into a home run paradise .

weather.description: The smallest outfield in MLB, offset partially by a taller left-field wall . Stadium architecture dampens the effect from wind but hot days can turn GABP into a home run paradise .

ballpark_pal.description: A small outfield with two distinct halves. A 19-foot fence guards most of the outfield's left side while the shorter right-field fence leaves that half vulnerable to home runs .

weather.description: A small outfield with two distinct halves. A 19-foot fence guards most of the outfield's left side while the shorter right-field fence leaves that half vulnerable to home runs .

ballpark_pal.description: A one-of-a-kind shape with a deep right field and a 37-foot-tall fence guarding the extremely shallow left side . Similarly, the 18-foot-tall fence in center offsets the close distance to home plate. While the tall fences help neutralize homers, they are excellent targets for singles and doubles .

weather.description: A one-of-a-kind shape with a deep right field and a 37-foot-tall fence guarding the extremely shallow left side . Similarly, the 18-foot-tall fence in center offsets the close distance to home plate. While the tall fences help neutralize homers, they are excellent targets for singles and doubles .

ballpark_pal.description: An unusually-shaped outfield with deep corners , shallow gaps , and a deep straight-away measurement to center . One of the worst venues for batter contact in the league.

weather.description: An unusually-shaped outfield with deep corners , shallow gaps , and a deep straight-away measurement to center . One of the worst venues for batter contact in the league.

ballpark_pal.description: The smallest outfield in MLB . Shallow in every direction. Not nearly as wind-prone as its Wrigley neighbor, but can be susceptible to homers - especially on hot days.

weather.description: The smallest outfield in MLB . Shallow in every direction. Not nearly as wind-prone as its Wrigley neighbor, but can be susceptible to homers - especially on hot days.

ballpark_pal.description: The largest non-Coors outfield in MLB. Perfectly symmetrical with a 9-foot-tall fence rounding the perimeter.

weather.description: The largest non-Coors outfield in MLB. Perfectly symmetrical with a 9-foot-tall fence rounding the perimeter.

ballpark_pal.description: A retractable-roof venue with a zig-zag outfield. Deep to each side but shallow in the gaps and to center field. The horizontal shape reduces the number of hits that fall into play.

weather.description: A retractable-roof venue with a zig-zag outfield. Deep to each side but shallow in the gaps and to center field. The horizontal shape reduces the number of hits that fall into play.

ballpark_pal.description: The home of the AAA Las Vegas Aviators features a large outfield that sits 2,000 feet above sea level . The open-air style makes it highly receptive to wind. A 13-foot-tall fence guards most of the left side.

weather.description: The home of the AAA Las Vegas Aviators features a large outfield that sits 2,000 feet above sea level . The open-air style makes it highly receptive to wind. A 13-foot-tall fence guards most of the left side.

ballpark_pal.description: A uniquely shaped field with a 24 foot-tall fence guarding a very shallow right-field corner . Straight-away center is close to home plate but extends to an extremely deep right-field gap . Cool temperatures are the norm and the ever-present out-blowing wind is neutralized by the stadium architecture.

weather.description: A uniquely shaped field with a 24 foot-tall fence guarding a very shallow right-field corner . Straight-away center is close to home plate but extends to an extremely deep right-field gap . Cool temperatures are the norm and the ever-present out-blowing wind is neutralized by the stadium architecture.

ballpark_pal.description: Horizontally shaped to the extreme. Deep corners and a very close center field fence. Consistently mild weather with a typical out-blowing wind pattern.

weather.description: Horizontally shaped to the extreme. Deep corners and a very close center field fence. Consistently mild weather with a typical out-blowing wind pattern.
